source.detail: Gas-phase harmonic molar heat capacity of the DGEBA monomer at 300 K from GFN2-xTB (xtb 6.7.1) frequencies, 0 imaginary modes; the MaterialsCodeGraph polymer-vertical eval baseline (mcg/evals/paper_targets.yaml, dgeba_cp300_gfn2, molecular_thermo.cp_harmonic_J_per_molK at 300 K = 397.7 J/(K mol), measured 2026-07; the eval tolerance of 8 J/(K mol) covers xtb-version drift in low-frequency modes).
